description: Quantum gravity - string theory, loop quantum gravity, black holes.

facts.context: Quantum gravity effects become important at:
facts.truth: Planck scale where both QM and GR needed
distractors: macroscopic scales we observe in daily life
only inside black hole event horizons
speeds approaching the speed of light only

facts.context: Loop quantum gravity predicts spacetime is:
facts.truth: discrete, made of spin networks and spin foam
distractors: continuous at all scales without discreteness
only matter is quantized not spacetime itself
identical to classical general relativity
no additional dimensions at all beyond four
only one extra time dimension added
two-dimensional spacetime exclusively

facts.context: The black hole information paradox concerns:
facts.truth: whether information is destroyed or preserved
distractors: whether black holes actually exist at all
only the mass calculation of black holes
Hawking radiation temperature formulas

facts.truth: bulk physics encoded on lower-dimensional boundary
distractors: the universe is a literal hologram image
information requires three dimensions minimum
boundaries contain less information than bulk
two completely unrelated physical theories that have absolutely no mathematical connection whatsoever
quantum mechanics to classical mechanics only without any gravitational or holographic implications
string theory to loop quantum gravity directly despite these being fundamentally incompatible approaches
grow forever by continuously absorbing all matter and radiation in their nearby surroundings
are completely stable objects with absolutely no radiation emission whatsoever under any conditions
emit particles only during their initial formation event and never again after that time

facts.context: The firewall paradox challenges the idea that:
distractors: black holes emit any Hawking radiation at all according to quantum field theory in curved spacetime
event horizons are real physical surfaces that have measurable effects on infalling matter
quantum information can be stored inside black holes and later recovered from their radiation

facts.truth: arises from more fundamental quantum information
distractors: is the most fundamental force in nature
cannot emerge from quantum mechanics ever
exists independently of all other physics

facts.context: Quantum gravity is expected to resolve singularities by:
facts.truth: replacing infinite density with Planck-scale physics
distractors: proving singularities are physically real
showing general relativity is exactly correct
having no effect on singularity predictions

facts.context: Quantum gravity effects on cosmology may explain:
facts.truth: the Big Bang initial conditions and inflation
distractors: nothing about early universe physics at all
only late-time accelerated expansion
galaxy formation without any quantum effects

facts.context: Testing quantum gravity is difficult because:
facts.truth: effects are suppressed by Planck scale far below experiments
distractors: quantum gravity makes no predictions at all
experiments have already confirmed string theory
all quantum gravity theories are mathematically identical
